# NEUS

> Portable identity, ownership, and permission receipts for apps, agents, and organizations.

NEUS records a completed check as a trust receipt. Supported apps and agents can confirm that receipt later instead of repeating the full process.

## What NEUS does

- **Trust receipts:** A reusable record of an identity, ownership, or permission check. Show it on a profile, require it for access, or confirm it through the API.
- **Gates:** Receipt-based access to content, rewards, and member areas, with optional USDC or card checkout.
- **Agent trust:** Verifiable identity, limited permissions, and reusable receipts.
- **Unique-person checks:** Reuse proof-of-human and wallet-risk results across a product.
- **MCP for assistants:** One setup writes supported editor configuration and signs the user in with OAuth.

## Quick start

Install the SDK and wire MCP for your editor:

```bash
npx -y -p @neus/sdk neus setup
npx -y -p @neus/sdk neus check
```

Then ask your assistant: "Use NEUS Verify before taking sensitive actions."

## Core surfaces

- Hosted Verify: https://neus.network/verify
- Hosted MCP: https://mcp.neus.network/mcp
- JavaScript SDK: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@neus/sdk
- API base: https://api.neus.network
- Receipt pages: https://neus.network/proof/{qHash}

## Read in order

1. Home: https://docs.neus.network
2. Get started: https://docs.neus.network/get-started
3. Quickstart: https://docs.neus.network/quickstart
4. Integration guide: https://docs.neus.network/integration
5. JavaScript SDK: https://docs.neus.network/sdks/javascript
6. MCP tools: https://docs.neus.network/mcp/tools
7. API overview: https://docs.neus.network/api/overview
8. Pricing: https://docs.neus.network/platform/pricing

## Pricing summary

- Free (Basic): 500 credits / month
- Pro: $19.99 / month (or $199.90 / year) — 50,000 credits / month
- Enterprise: Custom — 500,000+ credits / month. Contact https://neus.network/contact?topic=Enterprise
- Credit rate: $0.0025 per credit (USD)
- x402 pay-per-call: when credits run short, NEUS returns HTTP 402 with a signed quote; pay (USDC or native ETH) and retry with one header.
- Full details: https://neus.network/pricing

## Verifier catalog (14 public checks)

ownership-basic, ownership-social, ownership-pseudonym, ownership-dns-txt, ownership-org-oauth, proof-of-human, wallet-risk, wallet-link, nft-ownership, token-holding, contract-ownership, ai-content-moderation, agent-identity, agent-delegation

## Standard

The receipt envelope is specified as CAIP-380 (Portable Proof), an open ChainAgnostic standard submission. Receipts are verifiable against the spec independently of NEUS infrastructure.

## Optional

- Examples: https://github.com/neus/network/tree/main/examples
- Verifier schemas: https://github.com/neus/network/tree/main/docs/verifiers/schemas
- Verifier index (machine-readable): https://github.com/neus/network/blob/main/spec/VERIFIERS.json
- OpenAPI reference: https://docs.neus.network/api/openapi/public-api.json
- MCP server card: https://github.com/neus/network/blob/main/mcp/npm-dist/server.json
